reviews.comment:
Me atendieron súper rápido los chicos de playa del turno tarde. Fueron muy amables y serviciales, en especial al usar la app que tuve que renovar contraseña y me tomó tiempo hacerlo. A cada instante hubo buena predisposición y no me apuraron, al contrario, hasta me ayudaron a resolverlo! 10/10

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff on the afternoon shift were incredibly fast. They were very friendly and helpful, especially when I needed to renew my password on the app, which took me a while. They were always willing to help and didn't rush me; in fact, they even helped me resolve the issue! 10/10

reviewReply.comment: Buenas noches Romina! Muchas gracias por calificarnos y por los comentarios! Te esperamos nuevamente! Saludos y buena semana!
